/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/include  -I/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/targets/x86_64-linux/include -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-rpath,/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/lib -L/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/lib  -L/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -L/home/fujita_ryohei/miniconda3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs "CMakeFiles/kishi-to-nnue.dir/src/nnue.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kishi-to-nnue.dir/src/nnue_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kishi-to-nnue.dir/src/mate_solver.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kishi-to-nnue.dir/src/opening_book.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kishi-to-nnue.dir/src/nnue_usi_protocol.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kishi-to-nnue.dir/src/nnue_main.cpp.o" -o kishi-to-nnue  libshogi_core.a -lpthread
